title: Thai Chicken Skillet
description: A spicy and flavorful Thai-inspired dish made with succulent chicken, richly flavored sauce, and American skillet.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in the American skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil, garlic, and ginger. Cook for 1 minute.
Add the green chili and cook for another minute.
Add the richly flavored sauce, brown sugar, fish sauce, and soy sauce to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Return the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until coated with the sauce, about 2-3 minutes.
Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5-7 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
